claims.statement: Hyperion tree height is at least 6× larger than Kola Superdeep Borehole depth.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Hyperion tree height: 115.9 m. Kola Superdeep Borehole depth: 12262 m.

claims.statement: Speed of sound in air (~20°C) is slower than Elite sprinter top speed (approx.).
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Speed of sound in air (~20°C): 1235 km/h. Elite sprinter top speed (approx.): 45 km/h.

claims.statement: Channel Tunnel length is at least 8× longer than Great Barrier Reef length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Channel Tunnel length: 50.45 km. Great Barrier Reef length: 2300 km.

claims.statement: There are more bits in a byte than UN member states.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 8 bits vs 193 states.

claims.statement: First iPhone released happened before Barcode first scanned.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. First iPhone released: 2007. Barcode first scanned: 1974.
